T0157.title: Deposit-Backed Order Request
T0157.definition: In illicit data trading, a prepayment mechanism where a deposit (referred to as "rice" in underground slang) is paid upfront when submitting a customized data request before the order is fulfilled.
T0157.description: In illicit data trading, a prepayment mechanism where a deposit (referred to as "rice" in underground slang) is paid upfront when submitting a customized data request before the order is fulfilled.
T0157.usageExample: "No blind flow, private account receiving orders: 180 for 1 month, 280 for 3 months, 360 for 6 months. All flows require upfront deposit with order submission—no haggling. Direct from the source."
